title: MikArt Europe Official
description: A single modpack to include all mods required to offer a good gameplay experience
body:
A simple Minecraft modpack focusing to improve the gameplay feeling on MikArt Europe.

## Is this based on performance?
Not really, however it does include some performance tweaks. This pack mostly focuses on utility mods.

## Does it look good?
We have included some basic shaders and resourcepacks to improve the look of the game.

### Complementary-Reimagined
